title: Tao Te Ching 10
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 10 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 10 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Can you keep the soul always concentrated in its unity without separating from the Tao? Can you be as soft as a newborn child?
